_meta.note: winlog.payload.{event_data,user_data,payload_data} are mapped as flattened so they tolerate arbitrary heterogeneous nested fields from EVTX events (e.g., Security 4624 vs SMBServer Security 1006 have completely different EventData/UserData schemas). Without this, ES dynamically maps the first occurrence as text and rejects every subsequent event whose same field happens to be a structured object.
